evidence: If you like high drama and can stand the blood and gore plus the continued efforts to eradicate the Jewish population then you will probably enjoy this series.
If you like drama, suspense, intrigue, and a story of the underdog fighting the system then you should enjoy this series.
Around the 8th episode it took a twist that still has me confused.
The series shows how barbaric their control of the Greater Reich would have been had they developed the bomb before us.
Good storyline, good scripts with a hook at the ending of each episode to keep your interest until you can watch the next one.
There are lots of f bombs and some kinky sex scenes scattered through most every episode.
I thought it would be a good movie with a star like Dennis Hopper starring. I was so very wrong on all aspects.
The movie really shows how much influence Karl Rove and Dick Cheney had with the President.
The only reason I started watching this show was because it stars Billy Bob Thornton.
I really liked the Matrix movies so this one was a no brainer for me.
I appreciate that the dialogue is not drowned out by loud background noise/music like on most regular TV shows.
The movie also provides a good look at how the normal citizens of the Soviet Union lived in those times.
A sad commentary on how our justice system can be used to the benefit of the criminal while the innocent are left to fend for themselves.
If you like high drama and can stand the blood and gore plus the continued efforts to eradicate the Jewish population then you will probably enjoy this series.

summary: The user has a strong preference for drama, suspense, and action genres, often appreciating complex narratives with fast pacing. They value high production quality and emotional resonance in their viewing experiences, indicating a taste for engaging and thought-provoking content.
